title: VOW to Hire Heroes Act of 2011
fullText:
VOW to Hire Heroes Act of 2011 (Public Law 112-56).
An Act to amend title 38, United States Code, to make certain improvements in the laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

SEC. 233. EXTENSION OF VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION BENEFITS.
Amended 38 U.S.C. § 3102 and § 3103. Created a special temporary benefit extension of up to 12 months of vocational rehabilitation for veterans who had exhausted their basic Chapter 31 entitlement and had been unemployed for at least 12 weeks.
plainEnglish: Provided an extra 12 months of Chapter 31 training for veterans with service-connected disabilities who had exhausted their benefits but remained unemployed during the economic recovery.
veteranUse: A historical example of statutory benefit extensions for unemployed disabled veterans, useful as persuasive authority when arguing for training extensions.

amendmentNotes.note: Enacted provisions affecting 38 USC 3101, 38 USC 3103, 38 USC 3105, 38 USC 3116.
